title: Weekly Dry Time Charter Estimates, December 08 2021
section_path: Weekly Dry Time Charter Estimates, December 08 2021
section_path_text: Weekly Dry Time Charter Estimates, December 08 2021
summary:
Main
The capesize market continued to rise this week as sentiment improved for the spot and TC markets along with gains in the FFA sector. Iron ore is driving the market with plenty of demand for the west Australia to Qingdao route. The panamax/kamsarmax sector began to pick up this week after a period of losses over the last month.
